sub_modules.qgemm_quantize_matrix: Combinational FP32 matrix quantizer that converts packed floating-point inputs into zero-point-centered quantized integer values.
sub_modules.qgemm_int_matmul: Combinational integer GEMM datapath that computes VLEN by VLEN INT32 accumulators from centered quantized matrices.
sub_modules.qgemm_dequantize_matrix: Combinational dequantizer that applies Q15 scale_A and scale_B to INT32 accumulators and emits packed FP32 outputs.
